film.title: Paparazzi
film.overview: A rising Hollywood actor decides to take personal revenge against a group of four persistent photographers to make them pay for almost causing a personal tragedy involving his wife and son.

dialogues.dialogue: - I think they think they know you, Dad. - Yeah, I think you're right.  Okay, honey, I want you to go out there and have a good time.  - Okay. I love you. - I'm proud of you. You've worked hard.  - Hey. You ready, Bo? - Yeah. I'll see you guys in a little bit.  - Buddy, give me five. Huh? - Go get 'em, Dad!
Sure thing, famous guy.  - Good job, buddy. - You were awesome.  - Thanks, Mom. - I'm proud of you, son. You did a great job, buddy.  You did a great job.  Son of a b***h.

Good to meet you, man. Hey, meet my family. This is my wife Abby.  Abby? Matthew.  - My son Zach. - What do you say, Zach? Proud of your dad, huh?  - Oh, yeah! - Oh, yeah? All right.  - Keep up the good work. - I will.
